question: Reviewer surface separation: a separate bench review serve verb and process with import-contract isolation from harness.serve/harness.status, or role-gated routes on a single server?
author: claude/design

question: Reviewer identity: bound once at launch through resolve_actor (bench review serve --reviewer), or supplied per capture request?
author: claude/design

question: Capture hotkeys: 1/2/T/C mapped to our winner vocabulary (1|2|TIE|CANT_JUDGE) with enter-advance, or the LangSmith pairwise A/B/E convention?
author: claude/design

question: Packet transport: serve the built packet bytes verbatim (what a CLI reviewer would open), or re-render packets live per request?
author: claude/design
